dc_description: A wooded campsite on uneven ground with two dome tents partially visible: a dark tent on the left and a gray tent on the right. The area is surrounded by trees and shrubs, with dry leaves and small items scattered on the ground between the tents. Through the trees in the background, a body of water is visible with several small boats near the shore.
novel_visual_observations: The campsite appears elevated above the water, with the shoreline visible beyond dense vegetation. A small green cylindrical object and loose clothing or camping gear lie on the ground between the tents.
location_name: Piazza del Colosseo, Municipio Roma I, Roma
rich_context: Piazza del Colosseo, Celio, Municipio Roma I, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00184, Italia
